memory.summary: The stale air and laundry pile are actively draining my focus, so I'm moving to the library to protect my work session.
The library saves my focus now, but ignoring the room's odor means tonight's sleep debt will only grow if I don't address it later.

With my energy fully restored, I'm ready to address the roommate issue directly rather than avoiding it. Prioritizing our relationship now ensures we maintain trust long-term.
Locking in our agreement with Roommate_R reinforces our bond and sets a clear boundary for the future. This direct approach protects our relationship while securing my long-term well-being.
